name: codex-flows
description: Full Codex flow authoring, backend setup, backend operation, and workspace orchestration guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Author Codex flows and operate workspace backends.
interface.longDescription: codex-flows provides the full compatibility install: Codex skills for writing flow packages, authoring Bun flow steps, setting up local workspace backends, operating remote workspaces through SSH-backed codex-flows providers, checking Codex remote-control status, starting remote turns through a workspace backend, coordinating workspace delegation, and registering passive workspace lifecycle hooks. Flow runtime packages and CLI tools remain available through npm; this plugin installs the Codex-facing guidance and hook surfaces directly from the Git repository.
defaultPrompt: Author a reusable Codex flow package.
Set up the local Codex workspace backend.
Run codex-flows against a remote Codex workspace over SSH.
Inspect a flow backend run failure.
